canonical_definition: A multilingual, multi-granular Named Entity Recognition dataset with dynamic categorization, designed to evaluate LLM-based NER methods across varying entity type lists and granularity levels.
papers: TurBLiMP: ATurkish Benchmark of Linguistic Minimal Pairs

definitions.text: A multilingual, multi-granular Named Entity Recognition dataset with dynamic categorization, designed to evaluate LLM-based NER methods across varying entity type lists and granularity levels.
definitions.paper: TurBLiMP: ATurkish Benchmark of Linguistic Minimal Pairs

relationships.paper: TurBLiMP: ATurkish Benchmark of Linguistic Minimal Pairs
relationships.evidence: To address these limitations, we propose DynamicNER, the first NER dataset designed for LLM-based methods with dynamic categorization, introducing various entity types and entity type lists for the same entity in different context, leveraging the generalization of LLM-based NER better.
